blockingIssues.description: Act3 :mock mode rewrites files_written as project-root-relative paths; AutoLinker then resolves these against output_dir and drops links due to non-existent doubled paths, breaking deterministic mock traceability linkage.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md Web UI section to reflect that ER functionality is implemented (/er/ page plus ER section on /domain/).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce explicit deviation recording when UI changes are validated without agent-browser checks; if browser validation is skipped, followedProcedure should be false with rationale.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for misc-fixes-1 found UI-facing changes with no agent-browser evidence while handoff marked skill procedure as followed.
